nasb.text: Who has believed our message? And to whom has the arm of the Lord been revealed?

esv.text: Who has believed what he has heard from us? And to whom has the arm of the Lord been revealed?

cnv.text: 誰會相信我們所傳的？ 耶和華的膀臂向誰顯露呢？

ccb.text: 谁相信我们所传的呢？ 耶和华的大能向谁彰显过呢？

csbs.text: 我们所传的，有谁相信了？ 耶和华的膀臂向谁显现了？
